hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(\.env$|\.env\..*|package-lock\.json$|\.git/)'; then echo "[BLOCKED] Sensitive file protected: $FILE" >&2; exit 2; fi
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git add -A && git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m "checkpoint: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" 2>/dev/null || true
